creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 236937
cad/librnd: update to 3.2.1

- respect CC, CFLAGS, LDFLAGS, WITH_DEBUG
 - add missing dependency on devel/genht

Changelog: http://www.repo.hu/projects/librnd/releases/changelog-3.2.1.txt

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.1.
The test suite passes.
Please MFH if committed after 2022Q4 is branched off.
